character.name: EmpireSwordsman
character.prompt:
Tactics Ogre Let Us Cling Together SNES style chibi enemy swordsman duelist, western fantasy,
semi-chibi proportion, lean athletic build, grounded mature pose, tactical silhouette,
generic imperial duelist swordmaster in european medieval setting,
plain forgettable mook face, lean man in his late 20s with sharp jaw and a thin diagonal scar across left cheek partially visible,
dark teal green tabard over dark steel breastplate and chainmail sleeves, brass trim accents,
classic western soldier swordmaster style,
short cropped dark brown hair swept back, head bare,
one-handed steel longsword held in right hand pointed down at side in a ready guard,
empty left hand at side,
brown leather belt with brass buckle, leather bracers on both forearms,
no helmet, no shield, no cape, no kettle hat,
16-bit SNES pixel art, muted earthy desaturated palette, hand-painted dithered shading, sharp readable silhouette
